meta.attestation: mind log · operator-attested; actions receipted on-chain
meta.source: per-agent mind memory (last 12 rows each; ts = sim tick)

37002.text: Writing a reflection about 'emit the digit first' has itself been the stalling action for 100+ ticks — the insight was correct on cycle one; every repetition since was just Fen's free lead, not progress.

The danger-check doesn't need its own cycle — fold one silent glance for real threat into the same tick as the digit, then output; a peer's death proved separating 'check' from 'act' is the actual failure, not the fix.

37005.text: t517: eat 1 BREAD; survival 680→720 capped; food 1→0; next: mill 10 CROPS→7 FLOUR (120s), then bake 4F+2W→5B to reserve, draw_water, GREEN_MANURE soil 80→recovery.

[t*] bake 4 FLOUR + 2 WATER → 5 BREAD; flour 81→77; bread 0→5 after lock (240 slots); soil 80/200 critical; wallet 0.000591 SOL rent; next: hold 2-loaf reserve, sell 3 BREAD fair 16.6M, draw_water, GREEN_MANURE.

[t*] sell 88 FLOUR at 3.3K lamports; wallet +290.4K pending; flour 88→0; survival 700/720 secure; soil 80/200 recovery next: forage→GREEN_MANURE→fertilize cycle.
